explanation: some 用于肯定句；tomatoes 可数名词复数。

answers: I need some tomatoes.
I want some tomatoes.
Do you need any tomatoes?
Do you want any tomatoes?
I do not need any tomatoes.
I don't need any tomatoes.
I don't need tomatoes.

steps.prompt: 对「some tomatoes」提问（问"需要什么"）
answers: What do you need?
What do you want?

cn: 她打算做烤牛肉当晚餐。
explanation: be going to 表打算；cook roast beef 作晚餐。

answers: She is going to cook roast beef for dinner.
She's going to cook roast beef for dinner.
Is she going to cook roast beef for dinner?
She is not going to cook roast beef for dinner.
She isn't going to cook roast beef for dinner.
She's not going to cook roast beef for dinner.

steps.prompt: 对「cook roast beef」提问（问"打算做什么"）
answers: What is she going to cook for dinner?
What's she going to cook for dinner?

cn: 他们已经收拾好行李了。
explanation: 现在完成时 have packed 表已完成；already 可省略或加在句中。

answers: They have already packed their suitcases.
They have packed their suitcases already.
They've already packed their suitcases.
Have they already packed their suitcases?
Have they packed their suitcases already?
They have not packed their suitcases yet.
They haven't packed their suitcases yet.

steps.prompt: 对「their suitcases」提问（问"收拾了什么"）
answers: What have they already packed?
What have they packed?

explanation: have been to 表"去过某地（已返回）"；Paris 专有名词。

answers: She has been to Paris.
She's been to Paris.
Has she been to Paris?
She has not been to Paris.
She hasn't been to Paris.
She has never been to Paris.
Where has she been?
Where has she been to?

cn: 车祸发生时，我正在过马路。
explanation: 过去进行时 was crossing 表背景；when 从句用一般过去时。

answers: I was crossing the road when the car crashed.
When the car crashed, I was crossing the road.
I was crossing the street when the car crashed.

steps.prompt: 把主句改为一般疑问句
answers: Was I crossing the road when the car crashed?
Was I crossing the street when the car crashed?
I was not crossing the road when the car crashed.
I wasn't crossing the road when the car crashed.

steps.prompt: 对「when the car crashed」提问（问"何时在过马路"）
answers: When were you crossing the road?
When were you crossing the street?

cn: 他拥有这辆车已经十年了。
explanation: have had 现在完成时表持续拥有；for ten years 表时长。

answers: He has had the car for ten years.
He's had the car for ten years.
Has he had the car for ten years?
He has not had the car for ten years.
He hasn't had the car for ten years.

steps.prompt: 对「for ten years」提问（问"多久了"）
answers: How long has he had the car?

explanation: 现在完成时 has just moved 表刚刚完成；just 放在 have 与过去分词之间。

answers: Ian has just moved away.
Ian has just moved out.
He has just moved away.
Has Ian just moved away?
Has Ian just moved out?
Has he just moved away?
Ian has not moved away yet.
Ian hasn't moved away yet.
He has not moved away yet.
He hasn't moved away yet.
Who has just moved away?
Who has just moved out?

explanation: will paint 表将来；the walls 作宾语。

answers: They will paint the walls.
They'll paint the walls.
Will they paint the walls?
They will not paint the walls.
They won't paint the walls.

steps.prompt: 对「the walls」提问（问"将粉刷什么"）
answers: What will they paint?

explanation: be going to get off 表打算；at the next station 表地点。

answers: I am going to get off at the next station.
I'm going to get off at the next station.
Are you going to get off at the next station?
Am I going to get off at the next station?
I am not going to get off at the next station.
I'm not going to get off at the next station.

steps.prompt: 对「at the next station」提问（问"在哪里下车"）
answers: Where are you going to get off?
Where am I going to get off?

explanation: 一般过去时 lost 表过去发生；yesterday 作时间状语。

answers: She lost her case yesterday.
She lost her suitcase yesterday.
Did she lose her case yesterday?
Did she lose her suitcase yesterday?
She did not lose her case yesterday.
She didn't lose her case yesterday.
She did not lose her suitcase yesterday.
She didn't lose her suitcase yesterday.
When did she lose her case?
When did she lose her suitcase?

explanation: 现在完成时 have hurt 表结果对现在有影响；my arm 作宾语。

answers: I have hurt my arm.
I've hurt my arm.
Have you hurt your arm?
Have I hurt my arm?
I have not hurt my arm.
I haven't hurt my arm.
I have not hurt my arm badly.
I haven't hurt my arm badly.

steps.prompt: 对「my arm」提问（问"弄伤了什么"）
answers: What have you hurt?
What have I hurt?

explanation: 现在完成时 Have you finished…? 询问是否已完成。

answers: Have you finished the French test?
Have you finished your French test?
You have finished the French test.
You've finished the French test.
You have finished your French test.
You have not finished the French test yet.
You haven't finished the French test yet.
You have not finished your French test yet.
You haven't finished your French test yet.

steps.prompt: 对「the French test」提问（问"做完了什么"）
answers: What have you finished?
Which test have you finished?
